data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multiple clock-ins per day, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for multiple clock-ins, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this feature is operational or validated in the current saga run. Therefore, a gap exists in the requirement coverage for this specific functionality.
gaps: No evidence of functionality allowing multiple clock-ins per day (split shifts).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
